about.title: About OraSage
about.p1: OraSage is a divination platform blending Eastern wisdom with modern technology. We offer BaZi, Zi Wei Dou Shu, and Tarot tools to help you explore yourself and understand destiny.
about.p2: Based on your readings, we recommend crystals and energy products to help balance your elements and harmonize your energy.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.a1: OraSage is a divination platform offering BaZi, Zi Wei, and Tarot services, combined with crystal energy product recommendations.
faq.q2: How do I use the tools?
faq.a2: Click a tool card on the homepage to visit the corresponding app and try basic features for free. Premium reports are available via in-app purchase.
faq.a3: We use encrypted transmission and secure storage to protect your personal information. See our Privacy Policy for details.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.content: We value your privacy. This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal information. We only collect data necessary to provide our services and do not sell your information to third parties.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.content: By using OraSage, you agree to these terms. Divination readings are for reference only and do not constitute professional advice. We reserve the right to modify our services at any time.

famous.title: Famous Cases
famous.desc: Explore the destiny patterns of historical figures
famous.disclaimer: Os horários de nascimento neste artigo são estimativas baseadas em registros públicos. A leitura é uma interpretação tradicional de BaZi, oferecida apenas para estudo cultural, sem relação com a pessoa ou sua família.
famous.ctaTitle: Curioso sobre o seu próprio mapa BaZi?
famous.ctaDesc: O mesmo método — veja seus Cinco Elementos e estrutura em segundos
famous.zhNotice: Esta seção está disponível apenas em chinês no momento.

daozang.title: Dao Canon
daozang.desc: Biblioteca das Cinco Artes: clássicos de cultivo, medicina, destino, fisiognomia e adivinhação
daozang.annotationLegend: Notas marginais (眉批), anotações (注) e glosas (歌释) são comentários originais, formatados à parte.
